'''''Xerxes''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] that saw service with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. Along with its sister [[Starship/Legends|ship]] [[Nexus (Carrack-class)|''Nexus'']] and the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Vagrant]]'', the ''Xerxes'' attempted to stop the [[Defiance Task Force]] from rendezvousing with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] at [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]. However, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] force was held at bay by a unit of [[A-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Two of the fighters were [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Olin Garn]] and [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].
